fields.name: Golden Arc
fields.description: Once per scene, a thrown Spin projectile returns. On a 6, it may hit a second target. On a crit, +1 effect or +1d to the return strike.

fields.name: Vibrational Scan
fields.description: Use a spinning object to perform a Study or Survey roll. +1 effect when detecting structure, weak points, or lifeforms.

fields.name: Kinetic Tether
fields.description: Spin threads can connect two objects. Once per score, create a tether that allows movement, redirection, or restraint. +1d when using it for repositioning or rescue.

fields.name: Reflective Barrier
fields.description: Spin two objects at high frequency to bend light or sound. Once per score, redirect a single ranged attack or sound-based effect. Must be declared before the GM reveals the consequence.

fields.name: Gyroscopic Mount
fields.description: +1 effect to movement or melee Spin rolls when mounted or piloting.

fields.name: Magnetic Pulse
fields.description: Push or pull a metal object within your operational Range. Break line of sight or create an opening. Costs 1 stress.

fields.name: Stirrup Surge
fields.description: +1d on Skirmish while charging. On a 6, gain a knockback effect. On a crit, increase the potency.

fields.name: Rotational Grapple
fields.description: Fire a tethered grappling hook. +1d on mobility, chase, or extraction actions. Costs 1 stress if used to redirect a falling ally or large object.

fields.name: Wheel of Warding
fields.description: Once per conflict, use your vehicle to block a projectile. Mark 1 vehicle armor or pay 2 stress.

fields.name: Spiral Drift
fields.description: +1d on Finesse or Prowl while in motion. Chases use +1 effect. Gain "split momentum" (move and act in the same tick) once per score.

fields.name: Centripetal Shield
fields.description: While moving, expend your Stand armor to reduce a ranged attack's harm by 1 level. You must be in motion when you declare this.

fields.name: Echo Hoof
fields.description: Ride at speed to reveal terrain features. Acts as a Survey roll with +1 effect for environmental clues. The motion itself is the instrument — no separate action required.

fields.name: Gravity Path
fields.description: You may float, pin enemies, or launch into buildings with Spin-warped gravity. 1 stress per use, 2 stress for effects beyond your immediate presence.

fields.name: Drift Through Dimensions
fields.description: Once per campaign, you and your mount may exit the current scene through a dimensional fold. Avoid all consequences and reposition narratively.

fields.name: Golden Track
fields.description: At full speed, your next thrown Spin attack gains +2 effect and ignores 1 level of armor.

fields.name: Spiral Stampede
fields.description: Nearby mounts within your operational Range follow your trajectory. Create a 6-clock "Chaos Charge." On completion: mass knockdown, enemy confusion, or opening.

fields.name: Lethal Parabola
fields.description: Name an enemy's body part before a throw. On a 6, that body part is weakened, and the GM opens a 4-segment clock dictating how long before it can be used again.

fields.name: Arc Toss
fields.description: Curve your throw around cover. Grants +1 position. On a crit, hit through supernatural barriers.

fields.name: Line Cutter
fields.description: A straight-line throw hits up to 3 foes in your operational Range. Costs 1 stress if used mid-fight rather than in setup.

fields.name: Spin Snipe
fields.description: Treat your Range stat as one grade higher for thrown Spin attacks. At A-rank Range or above, thrown attacks suffer no range penalties regardless of distance.

fields.name: Devastation Chain
fields.description: Taking out an enemy grants a free follow-up throw at -1d. On a crit, the chain continues again (once per score).

fields.name: Overload Hit
fields.description: Take -1d to deal damage beyond your immediate presence. Open a "Residual Harm" clock in the zone.

fields.name: Shotgun Scatter
fields.description: Split a Spin projectile mid-air. Hits all foes within your immediate presence.

fields.name: Spinal Collapse
fields.description: Inflict a severe debilitation unless resisted. Fill a 12-clock "Nerve Damage." Until that clock is cleared, the target cannot use the affected body system without pushing themselves.

fields.name: Precision Incision
fields.description: When healing with a Spin-charged tool, heal +1 segment.

fields.name: Improvised Tools
fields.description: No penalties for makeshift surgery or treatment items.

fields.name: Spin Suture
fields.description: Stabilize an ally mid-combat. Stop bleeding or reduce Harm by 1 level. Costs 1 stress if under fire or in motion.

fields.name: Triage Sphere
fields.description: Deploy a floating orb within your operational Range. Allies near the orb gain +1d to resistance or recovery rolls for one scene.

fields.name: Remote Restoration
fields.description: Throw a Spin-imbued ball to heal 1 segment or remove "bleeding" from an ally within your operational Range.

fields.name: Rotary Armor Patch
fields.description: Apply spinning shielding to an ally. 1 temporary armor for one conflict.

fields.name: Spin Shunt
fields.description: Redirect one status or environmental hazard (electricity, poison, etc.) into the terrain or machinery.

fields.name: Emergency Fusion
fields.description: Once per score, two PCs may act as one: share clocks, action ratings, and armor for 1 scene. Costs 2 stress per user.

fields.name: Spin Scanner
fields.description: +1 effect on Study for diagnosing trauma, injuries, or internal sabotage (tech or bio).

fields.name: Spinfield Stabilizer
fields.description: Create a field where allies may reduce their Harm by 1 level per scene. Requires a fixed location; lasts until the location is compromised or the scene ends.

fields.name: Dismantle Strike
fields.description: Hit a weapon or body part with Spin. Jam or disable it — the target must push themselves or clear a 4-clock to restore function.

fields.name: Spin Fakeout
fields.description: Create a visual or auditory decoy. +1d to Prowl or to spring traps. Once per scene, an enemy acts on false information — the GM determines how this plays out.

fields.name: Fracture Intent
fields.description: On a 4+, the enemy misreads your intent. They target the wrong person or act at the wrong time.

fields.name: Jammer Spiral
fields.description: Once per score, nullify one relic, power, or tech device within F-rank Range (10ft) until its user pushes themselves to reactivate it. Costs 2 stress.

fields.name: Stand Stagger
fields.description: Hit a Stand user with Spin. Their Stand loses its next reaction or triggered effect.

fields.name: Neural Disruptor
fields.description: On hit, apply "Silence," "Stutter," or "Blurred Vision" — the target must push themselves or make a resistance roll to act normally. Costs 1 stress. On a crit, the condition persists until the target takes a significant action to clear it.

fields.name: Spin Muzzle
fields.description: Suppress sound-based abilities or commands within F-rank Range (10ft) until the situation shifts or a target pushes themselves to break through.

fields.name: Field Denial
fields.description: Create a zone within F-rank Range (10ft) where no powers activate until the GM advances the fiction or a target pushes themselves to resist. Costs 3 stress. On a crit, the suppression blocks an ongoing ritual entirely.

fields.name: Cascading Spin
fields.description: Debuffs spread on contact. Pick two targets; enemies that physically interact with them inherit the effect, and so on. Costs 2 stress.

fields.name: Aura Reroute
fields.description: Redirect an incoming AoE attack to a nearby area. Roll Finesse or Tinker; on a 6, full redirection with no residual consequence.
